intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current visual data. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are not identifiable as distinct specimens; the black pot contains only soil and debris. P3 (Pothos) is absent; the white rabbit anchor is present but the plant is missing.

plant_audit.P1: Yellow pot contains only substrate. No botanical growth detected.
plant_audit.P2: Black pot contains substrate and white debris (likely eggshell fragments). No plant matter.
plant_audit.P3: Black pot contains the white rabbit anchor and white debris. No Pothos foliage present.
plant_audit.P4: Shared with P2; no evidence of Silver Guest.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Substrate appears consistently dark and moist across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: White granular debris (eggshells) present in P2/P3/P4. A white cylindrical object (likely a marker or tool) is present in the desk space near the yellow pot.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows bare soil in all pots. No growth observed.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_t3: Introduction of a white cylindrical object near the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_t1: Significant drop in ambient light levels; pots remain empty.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: Return to baseline lighting; no botanical recovery or emergence.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total botanical failure. There is no evidence of active plant life, germination, or survival of the registered species. The environment is effectively a 'dead' substrate setup.
anomalies: Presence of white eggshell-like fragments in black pots.
Presence of a white cylindrical object (marker/tool) in the desk workspace.
Complete absence of all registered plant life.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit confirms a complete systemic loss of the registered botanical collection. Across the five-day observation window, the pots have remained devoid of plant life. The presence of white debris suggests an attempt at soil amendment or intervention, but no biological response has occurred. The environment is currently a static, non-vegetated substrate array.
